title: Smoky Skillet Pork Chops
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make skillet pork chops recipe that's gluten-free. The smoky flavor of the charred American cheese takes center stage.
instructions: Preheat your skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the pork chops with salt, pepper, and thyme.
Add the smoky oil to the skillet and sear the pork chops for 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the pork chops from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook until caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Return the pork chops to the skillet and top each chop with shredded charred American cheese.
Reduce heat to medium-low and let the cheese melt and the pork chops cook through to an internal temperature of 145°F.
